meta.title: Tenu — Your Rights. Your Language. Your Deposit.
meta.description: AI-powered tenant rights companion for international renters in France and the UK.

hero.title: Your Rights. Your Language. Your Deposit.
hero.subtitle: Tenu walks you through your rental inspection in your own language, scores your deposit risk with AI, and generates dispute letters when your landlord tries to keep what's yours.

features.heading: Six features. One goal: protect your deposit.

onboarding.title: Move-in onboarding
onboarding.desc: Your legal rights explained in your language from day one.

evidence.title: Guided photo evidence
evidence.desc: Room-by-room, timestamped photos that hold up in a dispute.

rights.title: Rights explainer
rights.desc: 10 key facts about tenant rights in France or the UK.

scan.title: AI risk scan
scan.desc: AI analyses your photos and scores deduction risk per room.

dispute.title: Dispute letter
dispute.desc: Formal legal letter in French or English, explained in your language.

followup.title: Outcome tracking
followup.desc: 14-day follow-up to track whether you got your deposit back.

scan.title: Risk Scan
scan.desc: AI-powered inspection report with room-by-room risk scores.

dispute.title: Dispute Letter
dispute.desc: Formal legal dispute letter in French or English.
